Title: A beginner's guide to Copilot CLI slash commands
Author: GitHub
Description:
Welcome to episode 3 of the GitHub Copilot CLI for beginners series! In this video, we explore how to use slash commands to control your terminal AI agent. Learn how to switch models with /model, check token usage with /context, and resume past sessions with /resume. Master these commands to keep your terminal workflow smooth and efficient.

#CopilotCLI #GitHubCopilot #GitHub
